notes: My Collection is now Collections, because you can now store multiple collections there
Make the lift web and other links in Inspector more share friendly (insepctor will now load into the page referened instead of the overview always)
Clicking the liftweb button it the Inspector overview will take you to the 'your deck' view of the feature so you can actually see the island it was talking about
Cards now show their tag's parent tags in Spellchroma. It'll make sense if you click around a bit
Added a quick-set button to snap deck size to 40/60/80 when an import doesn't land on 100 (for my brawl homies)
Spacecraft commanders now show up in legendary pickers alongside legendary creatures when importing a deck
When importing decks, removing a non-singleton card (like a land) no longer removes all of them
Added an Add button to the deck view, you can still add from the toolbar while modifying
Added free muligan option in the playtester
Your browser tab now shows where you are instead of a generic title
You can now replace lands more easily after generating a deck (Edit > Replace)
Fixed a bug where inclusions scores were not being imported correctly

Generated decks now better respect your Bracket setting when adding combos — building at Bracket 3 will no longer intentially put Bracket 4-5 combos into the deck (some combos might naturally appear in the deck however)
Replaced the Card Fit card on the Inspector Overview with a Lift Web card
Mana fixing lands should no longer show up in mono-colored decks
Add cards to your deck directly from the Inspector view (look for the + button)
Picking two themes in the Inspector now shapes suggestions from both (Thank you LuisMiguelMedina for the code contribution)
The Strategy score now stays accurate while you tweak a themed deck instead of dropping to zero after edits (Thank you LuisMiguelMedina for the code contribution)
Fixed the Inspector sometimes resetting your chosen theme or double-loading on wider screens (Thank you LuisMiguelMedina for the code contribution)
New tool: New Cards - quickly see some (hopefully) relevant cards to your deck's gameplan. Also includes a full tab in the Inspector dedicated to showing a larger set.
Set the theme of your deck using the new theme picker, affecting what kinds of cards surface as suggestions (hello new cards section)
Filter and sort My Decks by theme, with search that matches theme names
Redesigned the /decks page to make better room for the tag changes

When assembling a deck that has low data (like for an unpopular commander or theme), cards that get slotted in from the archtype's card pool rather than your commanders card pool get marked with a little icon
Save a snapshot of a card's web — a camera button downloads a shareable image of the connections graph
Multiple minor improvements within spellchroma, the lift web, and the cost optimizer
Excluded cards are now hidden from the lift web
Added a note when trying to edit a generated deck that saving it opens up much better editing options
Add your own combos to a deck — create, edit, or delete custom combos (even straight from a card's menu), shown right alongside the combos we detect for you
Better card menu: Quickly add a card to the last deck or list you used
Smarter Trim suggestions — now incorporates data from the card lift system
You can now drag a card from a browser window with Scryfall, EDHREC, or Moxfield straight into your deck to automatically add it
New "By strategy" browse on the home page — start from a play style (Aristocrats, Lifegain, Tokens, and more) and discover commanders that do it well
Clearer heads-up when your selected themes have very little deck data behind them, so you know results may be less consistent
Fixed SpellChroma cards sometimes showing no tags when you explore without a deck or refresh the page
Added a "New" sort to SpellChroma so you can browse the most recently released cards first
When SpellChroma hides cards, the count now tells you why (already in your deck, or not in your collection)
More mobile polish in the SpellChroma deck view
Add your own custom Scryfall query parameters to your Spellchroma exploration (Start typing it out and you'll see the new button to add a query)
Added a new icon for the Inspector
Updated card rarity picker to be multiselect (instead of max rarity)
Updated a few places in Spellchroma & the deck view to be better suited for mobile
Smoother performance and URL paramenters used throughout SpellChroma
A handful of small adjustments to improve the mobile experience
Lots of QoL Spellchroma tweaks, mostly centered around the mobile experience.
Deck/List selectors got a slight visual refresh across the app
Smoothed out drag and drop behavior within the playtest area, also added some new background options
Cleaned up a few spots in the Inspector and added a few new deck metrics there
You can now add images to your deck primers, yippee

Introducing SpellChroma — a new way to explore your decks and lists by tag. Paste a list or load one of your saved decks, then browse cards by what they actually do (ramp, removal, card draw, and more) and add new ones on the fly
Integrated SpellChroma tags within different parts of the app (top tags in your deck, tags for previewed cards, etc)
Commander search improved to showcase more accurate results, as well as recently spoiled commanders (assuming they've made it to scryfall)
Introduced Protection role (invulnerability, hexproof, counterspells, etc) to deck generation an analysis
Redesigned the Cost Analyzer (in the Inspector), now shows much better suggestions and swap outs
Card prices now always reflect the cheapest available printing, so a pricey foil or special version won't throw off your budget anymore
Arena-only decks now correctly include every card that's available on MTG Arena, and warn you if your commander isn't on Arena
New "Commanders you don't own" section in your Collection — discover commanders you already have most of the staples for
The commander spotlight now plays through your commanders automatically, and can feature standout commanders you don't own yet
Explore card relationships on the new Lift Web page, found in the Inspector
Updated the Inspector's Overview page for a few new graphs
Put a search bar on the deck building area (in the inspector)
Small visual QOL improvements when previewing cards
Cards with extra rulings will have those rulings shown when you click a card to open its preview
EA features no longer needs to be enabled to see the Inspector.
If you're a returning use you'll see a little notice notifying you that you can view patch notes and the community poll from this dialog. Hello! 👋
Its finally time to bump up our release version, this patch is filled with multiple small fixes that should greatly improve performance across most of the app, especially during long browser sessions
Minor bugfixes and small qol improvements across the app
Fixed the bug preventing the tagger information from coming to the new site correctly
Moved the Inspector out of EA into Beta, its now available for everyone to see and use
Generate & Inspect now builds a default deck for your commander and drops you straight onto the Inspector — your saved preferences aren't touched.
New Community Poll page — suggest features for ManaFoundry, upvote ones you like, and see what's shipped from the poll.
Find the link in this popover, right above the patch notes.
New site url is live! Follow the banner for the new link, as well as a migration tool to bring your decks, lists, and collections over to the new site.
When you duplicate a deck, you're now taken straight to the new copy instead of staying on the previous one.
Polish on mobile for creating lists and decks.
New Commanders tab on the Collection page — every legendary you own, ranked by how many EDHREC staples you have for it. The Spotlight up top shows your top 'Ready to play' pick.
Basic lands count as owned in deck views automatically — no need to import them. The owned count now includes your commander too, so a fully-owned 100-card deck reads 100, not 99.
New floating Lists panel in the deck view — drag cards from a list straight onto the deck.
Split Lists and Decks into their own tabs in the navbar
Visual and QoL improvements across list and deck importing, management, and viewing
Clicking in the darkspace with a card preview open will now clsose the preview properly
Undersized decks now have a 'Fill to X' option to help get you to the deck size you're looking for
Better warnings for when deck doesnt pass validation (breaking singleton rules, missing commander, etc)
Show a deck-list skeleton while card data is being fetched, so the view isn't blank during the first-ever open
Saved decks now load instantly on repeat opens — your stats stay cached so you don't wait on the spinner
First-ever opens fill in progressively: deck list appears first, then role badges, score, combos, and replacements light up as each is ready
Added a Refresh stats option in the deck's ... menu for when you want to pull fresh numbers
Synergy combos — combos your deck happens to assemble even if they aren't listed on your commander's combo page now show up too, with a small Synergy tag
Combos now show the extra requirements (like 'three Foods') as chips next to the card images so you can see the full setup at a glance
Hover a card thumbnail in the combo panel to peek at the full card
Relevancy score now reflects how load-bearing a card is in your current deck — combo pieces and the only card filling a role get a boost
New trimmer feature, for when your uploaded deck is over the intended amount and you dont know what to cut
Added a quick + button next to the Sideboard and Maybeboard headers to add cards directly to either board
Add cards to your deck directly from the suggestions
scrolling down in a deck produces a little side toolbar, allowing you to sort/show or enter/exit edit even while scrolled down
Minor improvements to replacements, replacements made avaialble in your own decks too - not just the generated ones
Replacements now include additional suggestions from EDHRec
Minor improvements to the List creation/management experience
Some fancy effects for when you click the button to modify a deck
Improved experience when using the Replace feature while modifying a deck
Minor improvements to the combo preview section, click a card name to filter on that card
Contrast improvements for some purple-on-purple chips across the app
You can now (finally) use the back/forward buttons to nagivate around a generated deck view
An experimental Inspector page has been released to EA (previously the analyzer). Quickly check your deck for role coverage, mana curve strength, and new card suggestions with ease.
The visual grid deck view now supports stacked cards, as well as all of the show options
Fixed a bug where you couldn't create lists as lists (they kept wanting to be decks)
Added clarity to the build page when using a commander with no listed themes on EDHRec
Mobile improvements for the new playtest page
The app has a name now - ManaFoundry!
Take your new deck out for a spin with the new playtest feature!
Made 'EDHRec Rank' available under the 'show' menu
Majorly improved the mobile experice across many parts of the app (I see you mobile users)
Playtest area — drag cards onto a free-position battlefield, tap, add counters, mulligan, scry/mill/surveil, search library, spawn tokens. Open from any deck via the new Playtest button.
Hotkeys in playtest: D draw, U untap all, S shuffle, M mulligan, 1-7 phases, Ctrl+Z undo.
Sol Ring and Arcane Signet are now auto-included in every legal deck (respects bans, budget, and collection-only mode)
New land count target control in the deck optimizer — bump it up or down to match how mana-hungry you want the deck
Random commander with a color filter now prefers an exact color identity match (e.g. GB filter picks GB commanders, not GBW or GBU)
EA Features toggle moved to the version/patch notes popover so it's available from anywhere
Cleaner alignment for combo cards in the combo panel
Fixed deck generator not respecting your land count
Collection-only decks no longer sneak in combo pieces you don't own
Moved the Modify Deck button next to the view toggle for easier access
Fixed text editor showing false changes for double-faced cards on freshly generated decks
Owned Cards Skip Rarity feature
Greatly rebalanced the way the deck generator handles combos, synergy combos should show up with greater frequency than simply popular combos now
Category (ramp/card advantage etc) number recommendations are now based on averge decks for your commander
Two sided cards with '//' in their name should import correctly now
Channel lands and MDFC lands should show up more frequently when generating decks
Inclusion score updated to be more accurrate to our internal ranking system
Fixed deck generator producing too few lands when using a large must-include list
Cards from include lists are now properly protected during deck balancing
Deck generator less likely to leave orphaned combo pieces in the final result
Deck score visible in the Statistics column as an EA feature
Improved UI when importing decks or lists
Statistics panel now shows how many cards you own from the current deck
Easily see the number of cards from your collection you own in the shown deck
